title: Axon Technologies
description: Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s., Also referred as Axon Technologies or axontechnologies adds new ores, armor with their own tool types, status effects, mobs, dimensions, and more. It is currently still being developed, so bugs may occur.
body:
# Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s.
#### aka Axon Technologies or axontechnologies

### THE ONLY OFFICIAL VERSIONS OF THIS MOD ARE ON CURSEFORGE AND MODRINTH!

# ⭐Notice
I decided to backport from 1.20.2 and stick with fabric 1.20.1 (may make a forge version but idk) for development of this mod 

# 📌Dependencies

### Geckolib and Fabric API are required and a recipe viewer mod (REI, EMI, JEI, etc.) is recommended.

#  ❓About
### If you like any of the features below, you should download and use this mod. For more information, please visit the [ wiki](https://github.com/StickManM/axon-technologies/wiki).

#### New Ores
* mimicarium ore & deepslate mimicarium ore
* fakestone & fakeslate iron ore
* fakestone & fakeslate gold ore
* void coal ore
* dreadstone diamond ore
* dreadstone netherite ore
* dreadstone thunderanium ore
* thudneranium ore
* renderium ore
* corruptinite
* denderium ore

#### New Armor & Toolsets
Thunderanium armor and tools are crafted just like vanilla ones, but with thunderanium ingots. Thunderanium Armor gives a new effect called Glitchster, which provides you with attributes like increased speed, strength, and jump boost. 

Later on, you can obtain more materials for armor & tools such as:
* red thudneranium
* dark thunderanium
* corruptinite
* axon alloy
* razzorium

#### New Dimensions 
These new dimensions include the Mimic World, Dread Caverns, Thunderlands, and Corruptionlands. 

* The Mimic World looks like the overworld at a first glance, but is made out of fakestone, fakeslate, and mimic biomes. It has the resources (voidstone) to get to the Dread Caverns. 
  
* The Dread Caverns is an underground dimension filled with diamonds and thunderanium. It also has a lot of mobs, including the Illusioner, Lost Miner, and Piglin Brute. 
  
* The Thunderlands is a dimension with more thunderanium ore and the Red Essence Zombie. This dimension is vital to creating red thunderanium gear. At the bottom of the world spawns Corruption Blocks which can be used to get to the next dimension.
  
* The Corruptionlands is a dimension where the Dark Essence Zombie spawns, allowing you to obtain dark essence, and corruptinite ore generates. Here you can choose between Corruptinite or Dark Thunderanium.
  
The gallery has images of how the portals look and each portal needs its own "igniter" to light the portal.

#### New Status Effects 
These new effects include Glitchster 1, 2, 3,4, 5, Antiglitchster, Thunder Poisoning,  Corrupted Glitchster 3, 4, 5, Anti Corrupted Glitchster, and Neutralized Glitchster. 

* Glitchster is an effect given when wearing a full set of thunderanium, red thunderanium, or dark thunderanium armor with the armor determining the level.
   
* Antiglitchster is an effect that removes the Glitchster effect making it deadly. 
  
* Corrupted Glitchster is an effect given by wearing corruptinite armor. It is immune to Antiglitchster but has its own anti variant which is Anti Corrupted Glitchster (called Glitchster in-game), but it is not as powerful as Antiglitchster as you still have some speed. 
  
* Neutralized Glitchster kicks in with Glitchster 3 or higher and gives you a weaker level of Glitchster to save you from Antiglitchster.  
  
* Thunder Poisoning is an effect given when you are in liquid thunder which is a custom fluid. It can be very deadly especially if you don't have proper gear. 
  
* Glitch X (aka GX) is an effect that boosts Glitchster/Corrupted Glitchster by a lot. To get the effect you must craft a bucket of GX Formula, and submerge yourself in the formula to get the effect. However, a caviat is that every second you are in the formula, you have a 10% of getting the Overdose effect.
  
* Overdose is an effect that most commonly occurs when you are in Glitch X Formula. It basically instakills you.

#### New Mobs
* The Lost Miner is a mob that spawns in the Dread Caverns. Legends say they are miners who wanted to get rich from the Dread Caverns’ resources, but something happened to them to make sure they never returned. This mob will attack you whenever it sees you, partly due to greed, but I'm just the description writer. what do I know? 
  
* The Red Essence Zombie is a very fast, very strong, very deadly, very scary, and very dumb mob. It can spot you from a distance, and if you hit one, all of them will be alerted. Luckily, the Red Essence Zombie is dumb and has a horrible path finding meaning that you can outrun it most of the time with Glitchster. However, do not let them gang up on you because if they do, you are dead.

* The Genetically Modified Red Essence Zombie is a more deadly version of the Red Essence Zombie. It only spawns when a Red Essence Zombie gains the Glitch X effect, and I hope you have a containment plan for it.
   
* The Dark Essence Zombie is a corrupted version of the Red Essence Zombie, and it inhabits the Corruptionlands. It is more deadly than its uncorrupted counterpart because it gives you the Antiglitchster effect. So, unless you have Corrupted Glitchster 3+ or Glitchster 3+, killing these mobs and collecting dark essence is going to be a pain.


# 🗺️Wiki
To find out how to play, please look at the [ wiki](https://github.com/StickManM/axon-technologies/wiki). The wiki is still in beta, so errors can occur. Please create an issue on the issue tracker for errors.

## ❗Disclaimer
There is more to be added to this mod, and some things are yet to be fully implemented or are planned and not yet added a the mod is still being developed. 

## 🤝Credits
- Jaboc0 for help with making the wiki and beta testing the mod.
- NateyNight and BosmanThe_BOOFIN for some of the textures and ideas.

## 📌Some cool things to know
The reason why Technologies is T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s. is because it is an acronym. The full name is Axon The Evilish Communist Hive Network Of Logical Octagons Generalizing Illegal Exploiting Systems. This acronym is obviously a joke. This mod is also a newer alpha version of an older mod made by me called The Red Thunderanium Mod and was for Forge versions 1.16.5 and 1.12.2. This version of the mod has many ideas from the old version, but not everything is the same. If you really want to download those old versions, then you can go to the abandoned Curseforge page (It is called The Red Thunderanium Mod / Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s.).
